{{Infobox location
| name = Zenith Colony
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

''See also: [[Zenith Colony Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith]] [[Colony]] is one of seven legendary [[Zenith Devices]], which are highly valuable artifacts created in a location that served as the birthplace of galactic expansion. Often described as a hidden city among the stars, the [[Colony]] is an entity capable of speech and possesses its own consciousness. Physically, it can manifest as a dark, glistening obsidian crystal or a faceted object similar to a cut [[diamond]], ranging in size from that of a human head to a human rib cage. It has the ability to fold back into a small stone shape and can expand significantly. Functioning as a massive refuge, the [[Colony]] contains an internal space capable of housing entire star systems under a violet sky. It serves as a vessel for various inhabitants, including the [[World Spirit of Basyrryx]] and potentially the core of the [[Karoshan rebel army]], as well as various fleets and ships. The [[Colony]] is selective regarding which planets it incorporates into its internal system and seeks to bring power closer to [[Horizon]]. While some scholars have historically doubted its existence, it is a proven modern reality.}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Zenith]] [[Colony]] manifests as a massive obsidian cube filled with purple light, containing an interior that resembles a fractured kaleidoscope of amethyst shards. Following the sudden emergence of ships spilling from its structure, the colony demonstrates the ability to fold itself into a stone no larger than a human head. During its time floating near [[Starhammer]]'s head, the entity served as a location that aided his investigation and provided a space where combat could continue. Although it possesses specific capabilities that remain difficult to understand precisely, the colony did not respond when [[Starhammer]] called for the [[Shadow Ark]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Zenith Colony]] appears as a huge, obsidian cube filled with purple light.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The space inside the [[Zenith Colony]] is a fractured kaleidoscope of purple like broken amethyst shards.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Ships spill out of the [[Zenith Colony]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34">''The Engineer'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Zenith Colony]] can fold back into a stone the size of a human head.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c35">''The Engineer'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Zenith Colony]] is floating next to [[Starhammer]]'s head.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36">''The Engineer'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Zenith Colony]] has specific capabilities that are difficult to understand precisely.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39">''The Engineer'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Zenith Colony]] is a location that aided [[Starhammer]]'s investigation.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c42">''The Engineer'', chapter 42</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Zenith Colony]] is a location where combat can continue.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c47">''The Engineer'', chapter 47</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Zenith Colony]] did not respond to [[Starhammer]]'s call for [[Shadow Ark]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c54">''The Engineer'', chapter 54</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator cannot read the [[Zenith Colony]]'s expression while he is in his jeweled form.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23">''The Knight'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith Colony]] claims to be picky about the planets it adds to its internal system.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith Colony]] is a hidden city in the stars.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c38">''The Knight'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Also known as the [[Shadow Ark]], the [[Zenith]] [[Colony]] is a specific entity within the cosmos. [[Raion]] once observed the colony before it eventually spoke directly to him. Later, [[Horizon]] sensed its presence, and it was identified as a member of the group that Shyrax is required to coordinate with. The colony's voice is heard emanating from the violet-edged sky.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Colony]] is also known as [[Shadow Ark]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6">''The Pilot'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Shadow Ark]] is a [[Zenith Colony]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Raion]] was looking at the [[Zenith Colony]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Colony]] spoke to [[Raion]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] sensed the [[Zenith Colony]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Colony]] is part of the group Shyrax must coordinate with.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Colony]]'s voice comes from the violet-edged sky.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
